description_long: This house complex features a modern, sprawling layout with multiple interconnected rectangular structures and open courtyards. The exterior is characterized by flat roofs, large window panels, and a mix of white, gray, and black surfaces, giving it a contemporary aesthetic. Several outdoor spaces, including patios and what appear to be small pools or water features, are integrated into the design. The property is divided into distinct sections, possibly representing separate living units or functional zones, all connected by paved walkways and driveways. Landscaping elements such as trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the buildings, enhancing the urban residential feel. The overall structure is low-rise, with a single story and a focus on horizontal expansion.
description: A modern, single-story house complex with flat roofs, large windows, and multiple interconnected sections, featuring patios, pools, and landscaped areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the rear, highlighting the central courtyard, water features, and the segmented layout of the buildings.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side perspective, emphasizing the flat roofs, open patios, and the linear arrangement of the structures.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the house, with visible driveways, landscaped entry areas, and the main access points to the property.
description_view_3: View 3 offers an angled view from the opposite side, showcasing the interconnected sections, outdoor spaces, and the overall horizontal spread.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature wide doors, paved approaches, and minimal overhangs, with some sections having direct access from driveways or patios.
